prompt: A candid, realistic photograph of a young {argument name="subject aesthetic" default="goth"} woman with pale skin, long straight black hair with bangs, heavy black eyeliner, and black lipstick. She has a {argument name="expression" default="deadpan"} expression, looking directly at the camera while sitting on a children's coin-operated {argument name="ride type" default="unicorn"} ride. She is wearing a black lace-trimmed tank top, black arm warmers, layered necklaces including a choker, black lace tights, and chunky black platform boots with buckles. A large black shoulder bag hangs from her arm. The ride is a white unicorn with a pink mane, gold horn, and purple hooves, mounted on a purple base with a small sticker reading "{argument name="ride cost" default="50¢ PER RIDE"}". The setting is outside a store with a tan cinderblock wall. To the left is a glass door reflecting a person, a brown trash can, and a white sign with red text reading "{argument name="sign text" default="NO PARKING FIRE LANE"}". To the right is a blue vending machine. Overcast, natural daylight.

breakdown.creativeCore: Goth Girl on Unicorn Ride：Generates a realistic, candid photo of a goth girl sitting on a children's coin-operated ride outside a store.
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 图标包、贴纸、表情、产品功能图标

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 图标/贴纸 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: overcast, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
